name: Executive MBA HSG
description: The Executive MBA HSG is a part-time general management program for experienced professionals who want to develop their management and leadership skills while continuing to work. The program combines academic rigor with practical relevance, focusing on strategic management, leadership, and innovation.
admission_requirements: At least 5 years of professional experience
schedules: Part-time format with modules every 4-6 weeks (Thursday to Saturday)
deadlines: Rolling admissions, applications should be submitted at least 3 months before the desired start date

name: International Executive MBA
description: The International Executive MBA is designed for experienced managers who want to expand their global perspective. The program includes modules in different international locations, providing insights into various business cultures and practices.
admission_requirements: At least 7 years of professional experience
schedules: Part-time format with international modules (1-2 weeks each)
deadlines: Applications should be submitted at least 4 months before the program start
location: St. Gallen (Switzerland), Singapore, New York, and other international locations

name: Executive MBA in Digital Leadership
description: The Executive MBA in Digital Leadership prepares experienced professionals for leadership roles in the digital age. The program focuses on digital transformation, innovation, and the strategic use of technology in business.
admission_requirements: At least 5 years of professional experience
Experience in digital projects or transformation initiatives
schedules: Part-time format with modules every 4-6 weeks (Thursday to Saturday)
deadlines: Rolling admissions, applications should be submitted at least 3 months before the desired start date

name: Executive MBA in Business Engineering
description: The Executive MBA in Business Engineering combines management knowledge with technical expertise. The program is designed for professionals who want to bridge the gap between business and technology, focusing on process optimization, innovation, and digital transformation.
admission_requirements: At least 5 years of professional experience
Experience in technical or engineering roles
schedules: Part-time format with modules every 4-6 weeks (Thursday to Saturday)
deadlines: Rolling admissions, applications should be submitted at least 3 months before the desired start date

name: Executive MBA in Renewable Energy Management
description: The Executive MBA in Renewable Energy Management prepares professionals for leadership roles in the renewable energy sector. The program focuses on sustainable business practices, energy policy, and the management of renewable energy projects.
admission_requirements: At least 5 years of professional experience
Interest or experience in the energy sector
schedules: Part-time format with modules every 4-6 weeks (Thursday to Saturday)

faculty.name: Prof. Dr. Rolf Wüstenhagen
faculty.title: Professor of Management of Renewable Energies

deadlines: Rolling admissions, applications should be submitted at least 3 months before the desired start date
